nodes.name: Usambara weaver
nodes.summary: Usambara weaver（Ploceus nicolli）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Usambara weaver。

nodes.name: Usambara weaver
nodes.summary: The Usambara weaver (Ploceus nicolli) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to Tanzania. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and plantations . It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links Usambara weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
nodes.shortSummary: The Usambara weaver (Ploceus nicolli) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to Tanzania.

nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
